entities.name: generator
entities.context: A tool that automates various processes related to knowledge extraction and interview preparation.

entities.name: PDF template
entities.context: A structured document format used for mapping decomposer fields.

entities.name: spikes
entities.context: Top strengths and gaps identified by importance.

entities.name: behavioral signals
entities.context: Indicators generated from verified skills identified in stories.

entities.name: interview questions
entities.context: Questions formulated based on identified skill gaps.

relationships.context: The generator maps decomposer fields to the PDF template.
The generator extracts spikes regarding strengths and gaps.
The generator creates behavioral signals from verified skills.
The generator builds interview questions based on skill gaps.
